## Checklist

- [ ] I tested locally with `docker compose up`
- [ ] I ran `npx prettier . --write` to format my changes
- [ ] Images are optimized (compressed, reasonable size)
- [ ] BibTeX entries are valid (if applicable)
- [ ] Links are not broken
